caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT MY MAN" and a black baseball cap with a logo sits in a podcast studio. He wears over-ear headphones and a gold chain with a pendant. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. The background consists of a white banner featuring yellow stars and the words "HUSTLE" and "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a logo that says "# BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and a red banner reading "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man is engaged in conversation; he begins by gesturing with his right hand toward his head and extending his left arm, then lowers his arms and leans slightly toward the microphone while continuing to speak, his facial expression remaining focused.
